privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env size_pv_battery_system task by executing a baseline PySAM simulation. Verified that the weather data is real (NSRDB PSM v3 TMY for Phoenix, AZ) from the SAM default library. Confirmed the expected ~177,026 kWh annual generation and ~20.2% capacity factor fall perfectly within the required metadata bounds (150k-195k kWh and 17-22%). Discovered a critical undocumented requirement: to pass the verifier's physical check for non-zero battery throughput (batt_thru > 0), the agent must explicitly assign an arbitrary dummy electrical load profile (e.g. batt.Battery.load = [50]*8760) and an analysis period (batt.Lifetime.analysis_period = 1) to the Battwatts module, otherwise the battery will not dispatch during peak shaving and PySAM will either crash with 'load not assigned' or generate 0.0 kWh throughput.
